name: junior-go
description: A portable closed-loop development harness for junior engineers, with Claude Code and Codex entry points.

interface.shortDescription: Closed-loop coding guidance for junior engineers
interface.longDescription: Use the junior-go loop from Codex through its orchestration skill, while preserving the Claude Code plugin and sub-agent layout for Claude Code users.
defaultPrompt: Use the junior-go loop for this non-trivial code change.
Plan, implement, verify, and explain this change for a junior engineer.
Right-size the junior-go loop for this task.
